rows.label: tev000294_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ah, my dear friend [ST:playername ]. We were
hoping you'd come by today.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0002
rows.name:
We just signed a major distribution
deal with a food manufacturer![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0003
rows.name:
Are you surprised? We bet you're
wondering which of our inventions
would be of interest to a food company.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0004
rows.name:
Well, let us tell you—it's a low-calorie,
highly-addictive, medicinal salsa![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0005
rows.name:
It's made entirely out of local Miran
fruits and vegetables, including cosse
beans, charupa leaves, and cranjelly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0006
rows.name:
It has virtually no calories, and
helps regulate blood sugar while
promoting good intestinal health.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0007
rows.name:
Its flavor profile is so complimentary with
processed meats, it makes hot dogs exponentially
more delicious when applied as a topping.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0008
rows.name:
So delicious, in fact, that test
subjects will eat as many hot dogs
as you give them in a single sitting![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0009
rows.name:
Well? Are you impressed? You know
how much we value your opinion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_JNK0010
rows.name: Envy

rows.label: tev000294_SEL0011
rows.name:
Express jealousy over how
much money Lu will make.

rows.label: tev000294_JNK0020
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: tev000294_SEL0021
rows.name:
Express concern that people
will overeat hot dogs.

rows.label: tev000294_JNK0030
rows.name: Advise

rows.label: tev000294_SEL0031
rows.name:
Suggest that Lu develop a
pizza sauce for the Ma-non.

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0010
rows.name:
This sort of research is far from our specialty,
but it was fun to experiment with the culinary
arts and end up with something so interesting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0011
rows.name:
Even if it only meets our conservative
projections, it should make a
considerable amount of money.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0012
rows.name:
Which we will then use to invent something
that makes everyone truly happy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0013
rows.name:
Ah, but we mustn't forget your human
aphorism— "pride cometh before the autumn."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0014
rows.name:
It is quite possible that we
will end up making only molehills
out of that mountain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0015
rows.name:
We must be careful not to end up failing so
dramatically as an inventor that we end up in
debt. Like a certain someone we could name...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0016
rows.name:
After all, this is nothing
more than a hobby to us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0017
rows.name: That is quite perceptive of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0018
rows.name:
The salsa itself may be free of calories,
but that isn't true of hot dogs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0019
rows.name:
The addictive properties would
all but ensure that our customers
would overeat and grow fat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0020
rows.name:
What a scandal it would be when customers
started growing obese off of a salsa
marketed as being low in calories![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0021
rows.name:
But...isn't there another
side to this scenario?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0022
rows.name:
What of the hot dog makers
who grow insanely wealthy
from our addicted customers?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0023
rows.name:
They would emerge with the greatest
profits of all, stealing the spotted
light from us entirely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0024
rows.name:
And when the inevitable class action lawsuit hits,
who do you think will be paying the damages? A
poor salsa maker? Or the mighty hot dog cabal![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0025
rows.name:
As you can see, we've studied your
culture. So are you impressed NOW?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0026
rows.name:
The representatives from the food
company made the same request.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0027
rows.name:
They said the Ma-non pizza market
is bigger than the human hot dog
market by a factor of 20.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0028
rows.name:
But it's not as if we set out
to make a low-calorie,
highly-addictive medicinal salsa.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0029
rows.name: It was just a flute! A lucky accident![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0030
rows.name:
So we decided it would be best to take
our time and start by selling the salsa.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0031
rows.name:
After all, a journey of a thousand
miles begins with a single successful
niche-market product launch.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000294_MSG0032
rows.name:
And since you had the same idea,
we'd be delighted to work with you
on the pizza-sauce research.[ST:wait ]
